LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT IS CONTINUED TO MAY 28, 2014 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 302 TO GIVE MOVING PARTY THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. MOVING PARTY MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN MAY 19, 2014 AT 4:00 P.M. OR THE MOTION WILL BE DENIED. ANY EXHIBIT MUST BE SEPARATED BY AN EXHIBIT TAB PER CRC 3.1110(F). JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, NOT REPORTED. (302)
MINI MINUTES FOR MAY-19-2014 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

calendar.matters:
MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT
Off Calendar May-28-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC's MOTION To SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT is granted. No opposition filed. Order signed in open court. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Maria Viscio #12353.

MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT
Off Calendar May-19-2014 Continued To May-28-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC's MOTION TO SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT is continued to May 28, 2014 to give moving party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Moving party must deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than May 19, 2014 at 4:00 p.m. or the motion will be denied. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.
